introLine1: Where your tablet comes to life.
introParagraph1: Welcome to the App Catalog—your doorway to every HP TouchPad App.  Here you can discover and download apps instantly and access Pivot, the app discovery magazine. Installation is automatic and new apps arrive daily. Find your favorites now!
categoriesTxt: What’s your passion? Entertainment, Sports, Music, Games? Tap here to explore.
savedTxt: Not quite ready to buy? Bookmark it and save it for later. It’ll be here.
searchTxt: Looking for something specific? Start here when you know what you want.
magazineTxt: We’re downloading your first issue of Pivot. When complete, Pivot will appear when you launch the App Catalog.
button_1_description: New, hot and noteworthy.</br>  Selected by our editors.
button_2_description: Bestsellers, chart toppers, and great values all chosen by you.
button_4_description: Shiny and new.</br>  Fresh from the developers.
